message:
chore: gitignore .DS_Store

macOS Finder writes .DS_Store metadata into every directory the user
opens in Finder, and it kept showing up as an untracked file in
multi-repo `ru status` reports. It's per-host metadata with no project
content — adding it to .gitignore so it stops surfacing as work that
needs committing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,3 +24,6 @@ a.out
 
 # Rust build directory (when building locally)
 /target/
+
+# macOS Finder metadata
+.DS_Store
